generated_exposure.exposure_text: As someone who values both security and personal freedom, I've been following the debate on expanding domestic security powers. While some worry about overreach, the reality is that our current framework is outdated. Just look at how quickly threats evolve - we need tools that keep pace. The 2024 Boston incident showed what happens when agencies are handcuffed by outdated laws. We can't afford to wait until the next crisis to modernize our approach. Responsible expansion actually protects civil liberties by giving professionals the tools they need to act decisively when it matters most. #SecurityMatters #BalancedApproach
